FreeText: The kids club is absolutely fantastic — my children refused to leave each afternoon. The staff were incredibly attentive and creative with the activities. Loved the pillow menu, such a thoughtful touch. Room service was a little slow on our first evening but the food was excellent. Would definitely return.

Kids club continues to be the highlight — consistently excellent, wonderful with children of all ages. My preferred pillow selection from last visit was already set up on arrival which was a truly wonderful touch. Room service was slow again unfortunately, over 40 minutes both nights we ordered. The family suite itself is spacious and perfect for us. Will be back.
